name: How get comp if employer says 'not serious enough' in Salt Lake?

mainEntity.name: How get comp if employer says 'not serious enough' in Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.description: **File anyway—'serious' not requirement; all work injuries covered.** Utah mandates reporting all.[4] Key factors: (1) Doctor note proves; (2) appeal denials; (3) retaliation illegal; (4) third-party separate.[5] Submit form online, medical proof, persist. Covers even minor with lost time.
